tasks.label: flutter run debug
tasks.command: set PATH=C:\Windows\System32;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;%PATH% && C:\Users\mjhay\flutter\bin\flutter.bat run -d M2003J15SC --verbose

tasks.label: flutter run filtered
tasks.command: set PATH=C:\Windows\System32;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;%PATH% && C:\Users\mjhay\flutter\bin\flutter.bat run -d M2003J15SC --verbose 2>&1 | findstr /I "Unhandled Exception NotInitializedError SupabaseConfig"

tasks.label: flutter run log file
tasks.command: set PATH=C:\Windows\System32;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;%PATH% && C:\Users\mjhay\flutter\bin\flutter.bat run -d M2003J15SC --verbose > C:\temp\flutter_run_fixed.log 2>&1
